use_cases: Primary navigation header for SaaS landing pages and marketing sites
Dashboard navigation bar with animated interactive elements
Futuristic header component for tech-forward web applications
Branded navigation with customizable color theming
ai_summary: A futuristic navbar component featuring glass-morphism design with backdrop blur SVG rendering, multi-color theming system (default, accent, destructive, secondary, success), and animated button states with hover glow effects. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible variant handling and tailwind-merge for optimized class composition. Suitable for modern SaaS, fintech, and developer tool interfaces requiring a polished, animated navigation experience.
